overview: Enterprise-level Travel Accounting ERP SaaS Platform for travel agencies. Manage flight bookings, visa/umrah packages, full double-entry accounting, vouchers, ledger, commission tracking, and financial reports — all with a stunning luxury black & gold UI.
features: Dashboard with KPI cards (Sales, Profit, Receivable, Payable)
Bookings management with auto invoice & journal voucher creation
Invoices with print and PDF download
Vouchers: Receipt, Payment, Journal, Contra (full double-entry)
Ledger with running balance per client/supplier
Reports: Profit & Loss, Trial Balance, Outstanding balances
Luxury black & gold glassmorphism UI with smooth animations
